conversation_context: Recent SMS thread between Mary and Carlos routed through the programmatic Twilio SMS line. Used for last-minute pickup, practice, and schedule change reminders. New keynote day logistics ping is drafted and staged, awaiting Mary's explicit send.

messages.body: Sofia debate practice cancelled tonight. She is home by 4:15.
Miguel soccer moved to 6:30 Thursday. Coach texted me.
Reggie just emailed. Room and time for my session shifted. Will forward the new details when I have them locked.
DRAFT (unsent): Keynote day update - I am on stage at 2 pm now in Theatre B (lower level north wing). Reachable after 3 pm. Reggie moved the session. Nothing you need to do.
messages.note: Draft prepared for Mary's review. Not sent.
